REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (157 Saint Charles Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94132)
Off Calendar Dec-06-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann making a special appearance for Attorney Amy Harrington.

The sale was confirmed at $803,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed October 31, 2019. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional bond is required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-31-2019 Granted Per Written Order
